subject: attorney general may file amicus in uc case against enron

emails.subject: Re: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.subject_base: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.body: Re: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron Jeff, this was filed last week. The hearing is this morning. We are waiting for a report from Bob and Mike, who are in SF. The Asst AG may be arguing at the hearing today. From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 04/11/2001 10:41 AM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.subject_base: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.body: Thanks. Any view on the likelihood that the brief will have weight? Best, Jeff Vicki Sharp@EES 04/11/2001 10:51 AM

emails.subject: Re: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.subject_base: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.body: Thanks. Any view on the likelihood that the brief will have weight? Best, Jeff Vicki Sharp@EES 04/11/2001 10:51 AM

emails.subject: Re: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.subject_base: Attorney General May File Amicus in UC Case Against Enron
emails.body: From a legal standpoint, they did not raise any new arguments basically they state that our turning back the universities is costing the states money. Everything depends on whether the judge is likely to rule politically or legally. As you know, we did not force the state to buy power for customers they decided to do so themselves. If you like, I will send you a copy of the brief. From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 04/11/2001 10:56 AM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
